conventions.null: feature not available for this tier / model combination
conventions.0: available at no charge (free tier active)
conventions.price_fields: always number type, unit defined by the sibling billing_unit field

context_tiers.gt_200k: prompt total token count > 200,000 (all tokens billed at this rate)

conventions.grounding_free_allowance_unit: RPD (requests per day) — uniform across all models
conventions.image_output_schema: single billing_unit=USD_per_image; token_count field documents token consumption for reference only — it does NOT change the billing_unit
conventions.caching_read_ratio: cache read price = input price × ratio (documented per model for verification)

metadata.model_string_normalization: Strip leading 'models/' prefix, then lowercase. GeminiProvider: s.removeprefix('models/').strip().lower()
metadata.lookup_key_pattern: {model_string}#{tier}#{direction}#{modality}[#{context_tier|resolution|variant}]  |  tier = standard_free | standard_paid | batch_free | batch_paid  |  direction = input | output | cache_read | cache_storage | grounding_search | grounding_maps | image_gen

context_caching_read._note: batch caching pricing same as standard (not yet separately implemented)

image._note: 1K and 2K share identical token_count (1120) per official docs
1K and 2K share identical token_count (1120) per official docs

url_context.paid_tier: charged as input tokens at per-model rate

file_search.retrieved_doc_tokens: charged as regular input tokens at per-model rate
